---
title: ""
---

<div class="mx-auto mt-4" style="max-width: 850px;">

<h1 class="title fw-bold" style="color: #b01c2e; border-bottom: 2px solid #e2e8f0; padding-bottom: 10px; margin-bottom: 2rem;">
  Blog
</h1>

<div style="text-align: justify;" class="lh-base">

The new CDT doesn't yet have a blog, but in the meantime you can have a look at the Interactive AI CDT blog. 

The IAI CDT uploads posts to its blog regularly, showcasing our latest research, events, and news.

[Blog](https://interactiveai.blogs.bristol.ac.uk/)

</div>

</div>
